task_completion.description: Open the text transcript to read the event storming flow and legend.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displaying the contents of storming_transcript.txt.

task_completion.description: Open the target drawio file in a diagramming application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A diagramming tool (like draw.io/diagrams.net) open with the file library_event_storming.drawio.

task_completion.description: Create rectangle shapes and add text labels corresponding to the transcript.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The diagram canvas shows multiple rectangle shapes containing text related to a library loan system.

task_completion.description: Apply the specific hex colors to the shapes based on their element type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Shapes are colored according to the legend: Orange (#FF9900), Blue (#0099FF), Yellow (#FFFF99), Purple (#CC00CC), and Pink (#FFCCE6).

task_completion.description: Connect the shapes with arrows to show a left-to-right process flow.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Directional arrows connect the colored rectangle shapes, generally flowing from the left side of the canvas to the right.

task_completion.description: Export the completed diagram as a PNG image to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog, file manager, or terminal showing the creation/existence of library_event_storming.png in the ~/Diagrams/exports/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical diagramming tool to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a GUI diagram editor (e.g., draw.io) rather than just writing XML code in a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent exported the PNG using the diagramming tool's export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Export as PNG' dialog or menu in the diagramming tool, rather than a CLI conversion command.

integrity.description: The agent manually applied colors or used the tool's styling features.
integrity.visual_evidence: The color picker or style panel is visible in the diagramming tool, showing the input of the specific hex codes.
